meaning: General Accounting Office(美国)总审计局
examples: Miss Gao tries to make her students express their ideas.
On April 18, Sun Gao from Hangzhou, Zhejiang finished his P.E. test.
Mrs. Gao often gets mad at her noisy son at home, but she is always patient with her noisy pupils in the music class.
The GAO recommended that the IRS do a better job of tracking information on many levels.
Lastly, GAO says that transporting the waste to any resting spot would also create logistical impediments.
